research_question_card.research_question: Investigate the mechanisms by which migratory animals navigate, including visual landmarks, solar and stellar compasses, magnetic-particle or biogenic-mineral mechanisms, electromagnetic induction, and radical-pair or cryptochrome magnetoreception. Focus on cross-taxon and cross-environment causal-mechanism questions, treating evidence as context-compatible only when appropriate.
causal_questions: What is necessary or sufficient for the proposed effect?
What mediates the relationship, and what alternative paths remain plausible?
Under which model, stage, time, or boundary condition does the relationship fail?

boundary_policy.instruction: Use the stated project boundary when assigning a paper role.

paper_role_policy.CORE: Directly supports the bounded research question or supplies context-matched mechanism evidence.
paper_role_policy.BRIDGE: Supplies transferable mechanism, terminology, or background but cannot alone support the core causal claim.
paper_role_policy.EXCLUDE: Conflicts with an explicit project boundary or final domain gate and must not enter core reasoning.

query_plan.query: (migratory animals visual landmarks navigation) AND (review OR survey OR overview)
query_plan.purpose: domain map, terminology, and established mechanisms

query_plan.query: (migratory animals visual landmarks navigation) AND (mechanism OR causal OR perturbation OR mediation OR necessary OR sufficient)
(migratory animals visual landmarks navigation) AND (barrier OR limitation OR inefficiency OR resistance OR incomplete OR failure)
query_plan.purpose: barriers, limitations, inefficiency, and anomalous observations

query_plan.query: (migratory animals visual landmarks navigation) AND (context dependent OR contradictory OR alternative mechanism OR boundary condition)
query_plan.purpose: boundary conditions, alternative mechanisms, and contradictory evidence

query_plan.query: (migratory animals visual landmarks navigation) AND (recent OR latest OR preprint)
(migratory animals visual landmarks navigation) AND (ecology OR evolutionary biology OR evolution OR conservation biology)
query_plan.purpose: cover a catalog-matched subfield without broadening the core question to unrelated disciplines

query_plan.query: (migratory animals visual landmarks navigation) AND (astro-ph OR astrophysics of galaxies OR cosmology and nongalactic astrophysics OR earth and planetary astrophysics)
query_plan.purpose: cover a catalog-matched subfield without broadening the core question to unrelated disciplines
